ShortDescription.Value: Fixes Residential Rent so thats its more realistic

Publish.LongDescription:
Paulov's Rent Mod
A simple mod that ensures that all Residential Rent is significantly increased so that there is no more 0-6c rent.
Features: - The first release ensures that all Residential Rent is significantly increased so that there is no more 0-6c rent and more akin to real life - Works with existing save games
## How to use 1. Launch the game 2. Apply the mod 3. Rent values will be updated the next simulation tick
